# 486_Final_Project
## Understanding the Repository
### Data
This is the data collection folder, it includes a notebook that pulls all of the data used for the project as well it includes a .csv file with the pulled data
### SRC
This is the part of the Repository where we preprocess the data and create and validate our models
### Demo
In this folder you can find a demo notebook that walks you through and demonstrates the models and predictions made by the models
### Progress
This is a group of .md files that document the progress of the project from start to finish.
